title: Add IP-based rate limiting middleware
description: Add request-rate-limiting middleware in src/middleware/rateLimit.ts that tracks requests per IP using an in-memory Map, with co-located unit tests. Uses a fixed-window counter (Map<string, {count, windowStart}>) keyed by client IP, resolved via x-forwarded-for header. On limit exceeded, returns 429 with Retry-After and X-RateLimit-* response headers. Follows the factory-function pattern from src/middleware/csrf-middleware.ts.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts — Express-style chainable middleware pattern for request processing
src/utils/*.ts — single-function files with co-located .test.ts unit test files using vitest
